chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application 735 of 2024 Aijaz Hussain Qureshi vs. The State For the Applicant: Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, Advocate Date of hearing: 09.07.2024 Date of announcement: 09.07.2024 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. Urgency granted. (2, 3 & 4) The applicant seeks protective bail, in respect of F.I.R. 03 of 2024, registered on 12.03.2024 before P.S. FIA Composite Circle, Shaheed Benazirabad, pertaining to offence/s under Section/s 409, 420, 468, 471, 477-A, 109 of P.P.C. r/w 5 of PCA, 1947 2. Learned counsel submits that the applicant has been erroneously nominated in the aforementioned case and is intent upon surrendering to the trial Court, however, in order to be enabled in such regard seeks to be admitted to protective bail. 3. In view of the foregoing, and without adverting to the merits of the case1, the applicant is admitted to protective bail from the date hereof till end of Court hours on 18.07.2024 or upon surrender of the applicant before the trial Court, whichever is earlier, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand only) and a personal recognizance bond, in the like amount, to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. 4. This Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE 1 Mukhtar Awan vs. The State reported as 1990 PCrLJ 617; Sabir Hussain vs. The State reported as 1999 MLD 2208.
